title: ceropegia ciliata
intro: Ceropegia ciliata, also known as the 'Tail Flower', is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Ceropegia ciliata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
